name: portfolio-phone-at-about-side-channels-into-contact
description: Cross-field side-channel at the new portfolio about state. User at WEB_COLLECT_ABOUT types a phone number ('+15677656788') instead of a bio. Bot must save the phone via the format short-circuit AND stay at WEB_COLLECT_ABOUT to keep asking for the bio. Same class-of-bug coverage we added to LOGO + salon + RE states.
